source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/02_ADD (HAD1417MCW)/▶ CE MDD/■ 1. 2차 CE 인허가/Attachment 10. Clinical Evaluation/Attachment 10-5 Post Market Surveillance Report/Post Market Surveillance Report (A-PMS-004).pdf

document.title: Post Market Surveillance Report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Post-market surveillance report for ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector, documenting PMS data sources, similar-device adverse event and recall review, PMS conclusion, FSCA/FSN handling, and PMCF determination.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Intended for authorized competent authorities and notified bodies of H&abyz Co. Ltd. and used to support PMS Plan A-PMS-003.
keyPoints: PMS was conducted in accordance with PMS Plan Doc. No. A-PMS-003.
Device is ADD Digital Flat Panel X-ray Detector for general radiographic diagnosis of human anatomy in adults and children, not for mammography.
Device classification is Class IIa by Rule 16 of Annex IX, MDD 93/42/EEC as amended by Directive 2007/47/EEC.
PMS information sources included literature reviews, media searches, and experience with similar devices.
The report states no additional measures such as product design change or process improvement are required after post-2020.06 market research analysis.
The report states PMCF does not need to be performed.

evidence.claim: The PMS data sources selected were literature reviews, media, and experience with similar devices.
evidence.evidenceText: To collect data, we selected three sources from the PMS sources listed in 'NB-MED-2.12 / 1'. 1. Literature Reviews 2. The media 3. Experience with similar devices made by the same or different manufacturer

evidence.claim: The literature search covered 2000 to 2019 and used PUBMED, European Radiology, and Medical Physics.

reviewFlags.reason: Authority signal is listed as general and the document references competent authorities and notified bodies without naming a specific notified body.
PMCF section contains text inconsistent with the device description: 'Our device is a product that pushes the limbs and helps the blood to circulate well.'
The report contains OCR or extraction artifacts, including broken URLs, misspellings, and incomplete phrase 'The following medical subject heading were used: ''.'
Source metadata productSignal 'HAD/A/F 1417-1717' does not appear in the extracted source text; document device model is ADD.
